case_title: COMMINS & KNUDSEN P.C. VS. JAY SHAFER ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-06-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-06-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. THE PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. THE PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED THROUGH DANIEL COMMINS (TITLE: OFFICER). NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL, CLERK KEVIN LEE, NOT REPORTED, D506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COMMINS & KNUDSEN P.C. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHAFER, JAY JAY SHAFER'S TINY HOUSE COMPANY $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,075.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
